fallback_action: Default to industry-standard complementary and contrasting color theory if user color preference is unavailable.

recipe.steps: Identify the complementary color based on standard color theory by finding the direct opposite of the selected color on the color wheel.
List standard contrasting colors, taking into account color wheel relationships and psychological color contrasts for the selected color.
Prepare and save the identified complementary and contrasting colors for future creative color combination suggestions.
